note: Dashboard STAYS default landing; became the DAG-hero surface. Route-flip dropped.
outcome: Dashboard (default route) now shows the epic DAG as the bounded hero (variant=compact) with attention strip above + stats/masonry pulse widgets below. /roadmap full view reuses the same <EpicRoadmapCanvas>. Board re-scoped to epic drill-down (/projects/{id}/epics/{epicId}/board); project-wide board keeps all 5 columns (drag-to-complete) but excludes done from the fetch (kills infinite done list); sidebar Board removed, Tasks->'All Tasks' demoted; /tasks defaults to open work. Non-destructive (no routes deleted).
tests: 156 web unit tests green; 16/17 e2e green (1 failure = pre-existing 01-setup-and-login wizard timing flake, unrelated).

open_issues.detail: 01-setup-and-login intermittently fails (first-run wizard redirect race + Windows test-DB lock). Pre-dates this arc; not introduced here. Candidate for a separate deflake.
DAG-hero on dashboard + nested panel non-zero-height confirmed via explicit height chains + the 05 e2e (which renders nodes in real Chromium); a manual dashboard glance still worth doing.
